label: Creep joiner downside
description: Defines a downside applied to the colony when a creep joiner pawn joins. The downside triggers according to its timing fields and is executed by the associated worker class. Inherits selection-weight and compatibility fields from CreepJoinerBaseDef.

repeats.label: Repeats
repeats.description: When true, the downside triggers repeatedly on an MTB schedule defined by triggerMtbDays. When false, it fires once after triggersAfterDays.

hasLetter.label: Has letter
hasLetter.description: When true, a letter is sent to the player when this downside triggers. Requires letterLabel, letterDesc, and letterDef.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title of the letter sent when this downside triggers. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDesc.label: Letter description
letterDesc.description: Body text of the letter sent when this downside triggers. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}, {PAWN_pronoun}, {PAWN_possessive}, {PAWN_objective}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the letter type (icon, sound, and pin behavior) used when this downside triggers.

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: Traits forced onto the pawn when this downside is active. Loaded via BackstoryTrait.LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the TraitDef defName; text is the integer degree (omitted text resolves to degree 0).

hediffs.label: Hediffs
hediffs.description: HediffDefs applied to the pawn when this downside is active.

triggersAfterDays.label: Triggers after days
triggersAfterDays.description: Random float range (min~max days) after joining before this downside triggers. Mutually exclusive with triggerMtbDays; set only one. Defaults to 0~0 (immediate).

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted to the pawn when this downside is active.

triggerMtbDays.label: Trigger MTB days
triggerMtbDays.description: Mean-time-between occurrences in days for repeating downsides. Mutually exclusive with triggersAfterDays; set only one. Defaults to 0 (disabled).

triggerMinDays.label: Trigger min days
triggerMinDays.description: Minimum days between repeated triggers when repeats is true. Only meaningful alongside triggerMtbDays. Defaults to 0~0.

canOccurWhenImprisoned.label: Can occur when imprisoned
canOccurWhenImprisoned.description: When true, this downside can trigger even if the creep joiner is currently held as a prisoner.

canOccurWhileDowned.label: Can occur while downed
canOccurWhileDowned.description: When false, this downside will not trigger while the creep joiner is downed.

mustBeConscious.label: Must be conscious
mustBeConscious.description: When true, this downside only triggers when the creep joiner is conscious.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: C# class deriving from BaseCreepJoinerWorker that executes this downside when it triggers.
